decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 9/10 sessions consistent. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 26/3368 lines reworked (0.8%, 40/50). 0/31 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 2.3% (10/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 58. Session 11: 44 (process:30 efficiency:10 ttfw:4). Session 12: 46 (process:30 efficiency:11 ttfw:5).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 251/251 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters share interface: NotificationAdapter. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
